name: Kintech Electronics Co., Ltd.
summary: Kintech Electronics Co. Ltd. engages in manufacturing, processing, and trading of single-sided and multi-layer printed circuit boards and electronic components in Taiwan, the United States, Europe, Japan, China, and the Southeast Asia. It offers its products for consumer and other products, communication products, PC and peripheral, industrial equipment, and servers. The company was founded in 1984 and is based in Taoyuan City, Taiwan.
